channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Rugby fans hold their breath as firemen rescue dangling parachutist
item.description: A French parachutist got stuck on the roof of a stadium that was hosting a rugby match over the weekend. Firemen were seen rushing to help the man.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaking Wayne Gretzky's record brings joy to hockey and beyond sports
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin could not contain his happiness moments after scoring his 895th goal to break Wayne Gretzky's NHL record and etch his name into the history books. “We did it!” he told teammates in an electric visiting arena with over 17,000 fans locked in on his every move.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Coby White scores 37, Josh Giddey adds 23 as Bulls beat Hornets 131-117 for 3rd straight win
item.description: Coby White scored 37 points, shooting 6 of 8 from 3-point range, Josh Giddey added 23 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Chicago Bulls rolled past the Charlotte Hornets 131-117 on Sunday for their third straight win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin fired just about the perfect version of his signature one-timer that has defined his remarkable career. When the puck hit the net, it made him the top goal scorer in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: UConn is back on top of women’s basketball, winning its 12th national championship by routing defending champion South Carolina 82-59 behind Azzi Fudd’s 24 points.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: The Cougars (35-4), who have never won a title, will play Florida on Monday night for the championship.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Defending national champion South Carolina returns to women's title game with 74-57 rout of Texas
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Dawn Staley has never lost a national championship game in three trips as South Carolina's coach. Part of the key to winning those decisive games? Forgetting about what happened the last time she was there. And this time, that was only a year ago.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Red Rocks advance to NCAA regional finals
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah gymnastics team is moving on to the NCAA regional finals after scoring a 197.625 on the first night of competition, tying with Denver University. Both the Utes and the Pioneers advance to Saturday's regional finals along with UCLA and Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 2025 Augusta National Women's Amateur
item.description: The 2025 Augusta National Women's Amateur is underway at Champions Retreat Golf Club in Evans, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Vejmelka makes 33 saves as Utah HC stays in playoff hunt
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah is not out of the playoff hunt just yet. Karel Vejmelka made 33 saves in his 18th consecutive start in goal, as the Utah Hockey Club stayed alive in the chase for the NHL playoffs with a hard-fought 3-1 victory over Calgary Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Investigation into death of former Yankees player's son turns to carbon monoxide: reports
item.description: Investigators in Costa Rica say carbon monoxide may instead be to blame for the death of Miller Gardner, the 14-year-old son of former Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9
